description_long: This object is a low, bushy potted plant with numerous long, slender, and arching fronds radiating outward from a central base. The fronds are pinnate, with each leaf composed of many narrow, pointed leaflets arranged symmetrically along a central stem, giving the plant a feathery appearance. The foliage is a vibrant green, with subtle variations in shade that add depth and realism to the leaves. The plant appears dense and healthy, with overlapping fronds creating a lush, full look. There is no visible pot or container, as the foliage extends outward and downward, obscuring any base. This type of plant is commonly used for decorative purposes in urban parks, gardens, or as ground cover in landscaped areas.
description: A lush, bushy plant with long, feathery green fronds radiating outward, forming a dense, low mound. The foliage is vibrant and naturalistic, with no visible pot or container.
description_view_0: From this angle, the plant's fronds fan out symmetrically, with the central cluster of leaves most visible and the tips of the fronds extending outward.
description_view_1: This view shows the plant from a lower side angle, highlighting the length and arch of the fronds as they spread horizontally.
description_view_2: Here, the plant is seen from another side, with the overlapping fronds creating a layered effect and the tips of the leaves more prominent in the foreground.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the radial symmetry of the plant, with the fronds evenly distributed and the central base slightly more visible.
